title: The Diderot Effect: One Purchase Triggers $3,000
hook: You bought new sneakers and suddenly everything you own looks wrong — that cascading urge has a name, and a $3,000 price tag.
angle: Named behavioral phenomenon showing how a single purchase creates a cascade of spending most people never see coming
audience: Anyone who's upgraded one thing and felt the pull to upgrade everything around it
key_numbers: $2,400 saved per year with one-in-one-out rule
